Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class RoleModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
public class RoleModel extends Object
JDBC Implementation of Role Model to perform business logic and CRUD operations on the 'st_role' database table.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Vinay

    Constructor
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    add(RoleBean bean)
    Adds a new Role record to the database after validating that the role name does not already exist.

    Deletes a specific Role record from the database using its primary key.

    Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_role' table.

    Searches and filters Role records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for pagination.

  • Constructor Details

    • RoleModel

      public RoleModel()

  • Method Details

    • nextPk

      public Integer nextPk() throws DatabaseException
      Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_role' table.
      Returns:
      the next available integer primary key
      Throws:
      DatabaseException - if a database access error occurs

    • add

      public long add(RoleBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Adds a new Role record to the database after validating that the role name does not already exist.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing role details to be inserted
      Returns:
      the generated primary key of the newly inserted record
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs
      DuplicateRecordException - if a role with the same name already exists

    • update

      public void update(RoleBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing Role record in the database after validating for name duplicates.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing updated role data
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs
      DuplicateRecordException - if the updated name conflicts with an existing role

    • delete

      public void delete(RoleBean bean) throws ApplicationException
      Deletes a specific Role record from the database using its primary key.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object holding the ID of the role to delete
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs

    • findByPk

      public RoleBean findByPk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and retrieves a Role record using its primary key.
      Parameters:
      pk - primary key identifier of the role
      Returns:
      RoleBean populated with record data, or null if no record is found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while fetching the record

    • findByName

      public RoleBean findByName(String name) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and retrieves a Role record using its exact name match.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique name of the role
      Returns:
      RoleBean populated with record data, or null if no record is found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while fetching the record

    • list

      public List<RoleBean> list() throws ApplicationException
      Gets a complete list of all Roles available in the database.
      Returns:
      a List containing all RoleBeans
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs during retrieval

    • search

      public List<RoleBean> search(RoleBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches and filters Role records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for pagination.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing criteria values (id, name, description)
      pageNo - current page number (starts at 1)
      pageSize - total number of records per page
      Returns:
      a List of filtered RoleBeans matching the criteria
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs during search execution
